$comment: Project-scoped Claude Code settings — committed, so everyone who clones
this repo gets them. Personal/machine-specific settings (permission
allowlists, absolute paths) belong in .claude/settings.local.json, which
is gitignored and merges on top of this file.
The PreToolUse hook below is the build-deck export gate: it blocks writes
into cubes/<id>/decks/ unless the current orchestrator run has a valid
The interpreter is resolved at call time (python3, else python) and exec'd
so the hook's exit code reaches Claude Code unchanged — exit 2 blocks.

hooks.command: sh -c 'S="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/agent_env/gate_export.py"; [ -f "$S" ] || exit 0; PY=$(command -v python3 || command -v python) || exit 0; exec "$PY" "$S"'
